feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Plastic & reconstructive surgeon and burn intensivist at Chang Gung Memorial Hospital, building clinically grounded AI for burn care, craniofacial and rhinoplasty research.

entry.title: Hello
entry.content:
This is the start of a small writing space alongside my research and clinical work.

I expect to use it for short, practical notes — things I learn building clinical AI that don’t fit into a paper: data quirks from real hospital records, what actually works (and doesn’t) when taking a model from a benchmark toward the bedside, and the occasional reflection on plastic and burn surgery.

If you’re here for the tools rather than the words, the live AI demos live on the lab site.
entry.summary: A first note on this site and what I plan to write here.
